name: Gingerbread Scones with Lemon Breakfast Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F (220°C).
2. Set aside 1 teaspoon of sugar; mix the remaining sugar with the flour, margarine, oats, skim milk, baking powder, currants or raisins, egg whites, molasses.
3. Combine until a crumbly mixture forms.
4. Gently fold in the reserved sugar.
5. Turn dough onto a lightly floured surface and knead gently 5 to 10 times.
6. Pat the dough into an 3/4-inch thick rectangle.
7. Cut shapes using a 2-1/2-inch heart-shaped or round biscuit cutter.
8. Place on an ungreased cookie sheet.
9. Sprinkle reserved sugar over the tops of the scones.
10. Bake for 9 to 11 minutes, or until golden brown.
Lemon Cream:
1. Combine ricotta cheese and thawed lemonade concentrate in a blender or food processor.
2. Process until smooth.
3. Serve with warm scones. Makes 10 servings.
4. Variation: For a thinner cream consistency, add 1/2 cup low-fat lemon yogurt.
